REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.

--- Aven — Bardic Musician --- HP: 58/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Aven — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 32 damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 26/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Aven — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
